notes: Scanner only inspects templates/ directory. WB Gamification renders predominantly through Gutenberg blocks (build/Blocks/) + admin page classes (src/Admin/) + a small templates/ dir (6 files per audit inventory). The skipped test is the templates-vs-admin wiring check — not applicable to this plugin's architecture. Settings save/read parity is enforced via REST controllers + admin pages, not via Settings API in templates.
